choices.text: Supervisor agent routes work to specialist agents (researcher, writer, reviewer). After each specialist completes, control returns to supervisor; supervisor decides next or FINISH. Clean separation of concerns; each specialist focused on domain with own prompt + tools.

questions.explanation: Supervisor routes; specialists execute; loop until FINISH.

questions.prompt: Need to: research topic, write article, review for accuracy. Architecture?

choices.text: Supervisor + 3 specialists (researcher, writer, reviewer). Supervisor decides order: research → write → review → (if issues found) → back to researcher or writer → review → FINISH. Each specialist has focused prompt + relevant tools (researcher: web search; writer: content tools; reviewer: fact-checking). State accumulates: research notes, draft, review feedback. Pro multi-agent pattern; cleaner than monolithic agent for multi-skill tasks.

questions.explanation: Supervisor + 3 specialists. Each focused; supervisor orchestrates.
